productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max Quarter Black Sports Shoes
description: Bag that hoop with this pair of nike Air Max Quarter shoes. Designed for Basketball lovers, this shoe adds an urban flair to the classic sport and ensures optimum performance.UpperSynthetic leather upper with nike swoosh overlays on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structurePerforations on the forefoot and midfoot region for enhanced breathabilityMeshed and padded tongue and collar for snug comfortPadded fabric lining for optimal performanceLacing system for a snug, customised FitSockliner that moulds to the shape of the foot for a customised fitMidsoleEncapsulated Air-Sole unit in the heel region for impact protection Full length Pylon midsole for optimum cushioning and lightweight comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for optimal grip and tractionWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not store under direct sunlight
